name: cortex-code-for-vscode
description: A polished VSCode host for the Snowflake Cortex Code CLI. Renders Cortex Code sessions inside a Fivetran Code-inspired webview with chat bubbles, tool call cards, and themed chrome.

commands.title: Cortex Code: Open in Editor Tab

cortexCodeForVscode.binaryPath.description: Path to the cortex CLI binary (the extension passes 'code' as the first argument). For example, if your binary is at /usr/local/bin/cortex, leave this as 'cortex'. Override if it lives somewhere else.

cortexCodeForVscode.cwd.description: Working directory for the cortex code subprocess. Empty = VSCode workspace root.

cortexCodeForVscode.autoStart.description: Automatically start a cortex code session when the panel opens.

cortexCodeForVscode.preferEditorTab.description: When the sidebar view opens, also open Cortex Code in an editor tab (mimics Fivetran Code's primary-UI behavior). Both surfaces share the same session.

cortexCodeForVscode.pricingModel.description: Which Claude model's pricing to use for the session cost estimate in the footer. Snowflake Cortex Complete reports model='auto' without specifying the actual variant, so we default to Sonnet 4.6. Set this to match your Snowflake Cortex Complete configuration if you know it's different.
